
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I need to first get closer to the objects on the table to better identify which one is blue and circular. From my current position, I can see several objects but need a clearer view. I will approach point P12 which is near the table with the objects.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.86,
  "z": -0.81
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983280649, 'end': 1762983287704, 'elapsed': 7055}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 651.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 2590842, 't1': 2591493, 'elapsed': 651}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6374, completion=155, total=6529
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=\-0.65, y=0.08, z=\-0.81\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now I will look more closely at the objects on the table to identify the blue circular object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.08,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -1.35
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983288360, 'end': 1762983295422, 'elapsed': 7062}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1334.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 2598559, 't1': 2599893, 'elapsed': 1334}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6562, completion=119, total=6681
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the updated perception, I can now see the objects more clearly. I can identify object tagged as '27' which appears to be a blue circular object. It matches the description of being both blue and circular in shape. I will now attempt to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "27"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983296762, 'end': 1762983307909, 'elapsed': 11147}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 693.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 2611047, 't1': 2611740, 'elapsed': 693}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8239, completion=117, total=8356
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object 27

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object you requested. It was identified by tag 27 in the environment.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762983308608, 'end': 1762983316748, 'elapsed': 8140}`

</details>

</details>
